title: × orchiserapias sonii subsp. ducoroniae
side_effects: × orchiserapias sonii subsp. ducoroniae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and allergic reactions. Ingesting large quantities of the plant's extract may lead to gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain. Furthermore, using × orchiserapias sonii subsp. ducoroniae in conjunction with other medications can cause interactions that may worsen conditions such as high blood pressure or diabetes. In rare cases, improper use of the plant may even trigger anaphylaxis, a severe and potentially life-threatening allergic reaction.
